title: Platyopuntia cordobensis
taxonomy: Platyopuntia cordobensis is classified as a species within the genus Platyopuntia, which is a group of cacti in the family Cactaceae. The family Cactaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are native to the Americas. Within the Cactaceae family, Platyopuntia cordobensis is placed in the subfamily Opuntioideae, which includes various species of cacti with flat, rounded stems. The Opuntioideae subfamily is further divided into several tribes, but the exact tribe classification of Platyopuntia cordobensis is not specified in available information. Further research is needed to determine the exact tribe classification of this species.
